# opnsense_dnsmasq_domain (Resource)

Manages a Dnsmasq domain override on OPNsense. Domain overrides forward matching domain queries to a configured upstream address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_dnsmasq_domain" "corp" {
  domain      = "corp.example.com"
  ip          = "192.0.2.53"
  description = "Forward corporate domain queries"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain name to override.
- `ip` (String) IP address or upstream server for this domain override.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description for this domain override.
- `ipset` (String) Firewall alias/IP set relation for this domain override.
- `port` (Number) Optional DNS server port.
- `sequence` (Number) Sequence number for ordering domain overrides.
- `source_ip` (String) Optional source IP constraint.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the Dnsmasq domain override UUID from OPNsense.

```shell
terraform import opnsense_dnsmasq_domain.corp 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
